name: codex-elixir-phoenix
description: Elixir/Phoenix/LiveView development with specialist workflows, Iron Laws, hooks, and Tidewave MCP guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Elixir, Phoenix, LiveView, Ecto, Oban, and OTP workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-compatible port of Oliver Kriska's Claude Elixir/Phoenix plugin. It bundles focused skills for planning, review, verification, debugging, dependency auditing, LiveView patterns, Ecto patterns, Oban, deployment, and security, plus lifecycle hooks adapted to Codex's hook contract.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Elixir Phoenix to review this Phoenix change.
Use Codex Elixir Phoenix to debug this failing mix test.
Use Codex Elixir Phoenix to plan this LiveView feature.
